text:
Now I understand the full picture. The chain select dialog already has all Relay chains. The top-left dropdown needs to use the same chain list but call `switchChain` — which only works for wagmi-registered chains. 

The real solution: **dynamically add the chain to wagmi** using `addEthereumChain` (EIP-3085) via the wallet directly, which works for any EVM chain. This is what MetaMask and other wallets support.
